title: mentzelia gypsophila
intro: Mentzelia gypsophila, also known as pinwheel or rock gilia, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mentzelia gypsophila include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Mentzelia gypsophila can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as to calm digestive issues.
